Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember accepting an[n]{f 0 1 41}Anatomical Model{f 0 1 27} that was[n]about to be thrown away here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door is tightly sealed. Probably[n]because of dangerous chemicals inside.[n]{f 1 1}
